/CAL: MOTION TO MODIFY SENTENCE RE SWAP CONDITIONS/X: FOR REASONS AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD, MOTION IS GRANTED/CTORD: PREVIOUS SWAP CONDITION ORDERED ON 09-03-20 IS HEREBY VACATED/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE SENTENCE VIAEM TO BE MONITORED BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/X: DEFENDANT SENTNECED TO10 DAYS CJ WITH 1 DAY CTS/X: BALANCE IS SERVEABLE THROUGH EM/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORTTO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON 09-04-20/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/
